summary: Delete open question in a given template
description: Delete open question in a given template. Endpoint: DELETE /c/{company_id}/open_questions/template/{template_id}/open_questions/{id}. Required parameters: id, template_id, company_id.
example_request:
DELETE /c/{company_id}/open_questions/template/{template_id}/open_questions/{id}

Required params: id, template_id, company_id
